name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 6 Feb 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.88"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where some products listed on eBay showed a stock level of 0."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where Contact Us form emails weren't being sent with the correct from address."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where order totals did not match between the payment gateway and the Neto order."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the Refresh Cache pop-up box could not be closed."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue on eBay orders where the order date placed was in the future."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
